hero_services.title: Sales
hero_services.description: We sell most all brands of pool equipment from pumps, heaters, filters and lights at prices competitive with online distributors but with quality local installation.

hero_services.title: Repairs
hero_services.description: We repair most any brands of pool and spa equipment. From a simple fix to a complete upgrade, we've got the parts to keep your pool looking good.

hero_services.title: Replaster
hero_services.description: If your pool is looking worn out, it might be time to replaster. We can help you refresh your outdoor living space by replastering your pool.

about_text: For more than 25 years, our family owned and operated company has helped customers throughout the cities of Fullerton, La Habra, La Mirada, Whittier, Brea, and Yorba Linda as well as all surrounding areas to design, re-plaster and repair their pools, spas and water features. Your satisfaction is our priority, with prompt, professional service and fair pricing on labor and equipment. Commercial pools, spas, fountains, waterfalls, streams – our company is able to assist with a variety of all re-plaster, remodel and repair needs. We service and install all makes and models of pool and spa equipment, including chlorine and natural salt systems. We also repair portable (above-ground) spas!
trust_signals: Top-rated with the Better Business Bureau

common_problems.title: Low Suction & Circulation
common_problems.description: Has there been a decrease in your pool suction? Water isn't flowing as fast as it should or maybe your pool cleaner is running much slower, or even stopped? We can help to diagnose and repair the problem!

common_problems.title: Noisy & Leaking Pumps
common_problems.description: Leaking pumps not only cause wasteful water loss, but leaks from the pumps shaft seals destroy the pump's motor bearings causing them to rust, create excessive noise and eventually stop turning. Call a professional today and let us check it out!

common_problems.title: Water Leaks & Water Loss
common_problems.description: Losing water in your pool? Excessive water loss (more than 1" per week) can be considered a leak. Some equipment leaks can easily be located and repaired, while others might be underground causing erosion and require more extensive testing to locate and correct.

warranty: PSMP warrants to the original purchaser that products and services will be free from defects in material and/or workmanship. Components are covered for parts and labor for 1 year after installation/sale unless otherwise noted on the invoice.
